title: bufonia kotschyana
intro: Bufonia kotschyana, also known as the rock jasmine or bufonia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Plumbaginaceae. It is native to the Middle East and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of bufonia kotschyana include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The plant is commonly prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
